creator: lopez.on.the.lists@yellowspace.net
text:
I suppose this is related to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=243225 where I recently posted problems with mpr and a similar controller (DELL PowerEdge R440 with the DELL PERC HBA330, very similar behaviour). 
If needed I can send boot videos and logs.
